remarks: Experience luxury living at its finest with this exquisite brand-new masterpiece built by award winning builder. Convenience & sophisticated style is what you get with this ultra-chic 4 bedroom 4.5 bathroom one of a kind property that will take your breath away from the moment you walk through the front door. Built with the best finishes in mind, you'll enjoy 9ft+ ceilings, Elevator, flexible open floor plan, office, gorgeous family with gas fireplace and walls of large-pane oversized glass that open up to your private terrace overlooking the beautifully manicured back yard creating the perfect indoor/outdoor living experience. Exquisite mill work, white oak floors, custom staircases, and built-ins truly show meticulous attention to detail. Absolutely spectacular primary bedroom with large walk-in closet and spa inspired bathroom featuring a 7tt x 4ft walk in shower, soaking tub, floating vanity, and heated floors. (All bedrooms have en-sutie bathrooms). Gorgeous mudroom with elevator that travels from bedroom level to the finished walkout basement. Additional features include Spray foam and sound proofing insulation, irrigation system, Hydro HVAC system, and more. Too many features to list. Walking distance to New Canaan's favorite restaurants, shops and train station.
